languages.text: {n}Передавая Себериана в руки {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Инквизиции{/g}, вы замечаете, что даже перед лицом смерти Лорд-капитан не лишился прежней выправки. Грудь с выгравированным гербом династии фон Валанциус выпячена, а металлический подбородок гордо задран, когда он величественно шагает к эшафоту.{/n}
languages.translation_comment: Таймлуп ломается, дает Obj3_Add_TraitorSuccess, Obj2_Add_Conspiracy, выполняет Obj2_DestroyMorale и TraitorsConspiracy_quest

traits.locale_text: {n}Передавая Себериана в руки {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Инквизиции{/g}, вы замечаете, как сильно он переменился. Осунувшийся, разбитый, лишившийся прежней выправки, Лорд-капитан еле волочит металлические ноги. Еще недавно в нем чувствовалась неумолимость боевой машины; теперь он кажется почти жалким. {/n}

languages.translation_comment: Таймлуп ломается, дает Obj3_Add_TraitorSuccess, Obj2_Add_Conspiracy, выполняет Obj2_DestroyMorale и TraitorsConspiracy_quest

languages.text: {n}When you hand Seberian over to the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, you notice that the Lord Captain never once lost his signature poise, even in the face of death. Thrusting out his chest emblazoned with the von Valancius coat of arms and with his metal chin proudly raised, the Rogue Trader marches majestically to his execution.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Передавая Себериана в руки {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Инквизиции{/g}, вы замечаете, что даже перед лицом смерти Лорд-капитан не лишился прежней выправки. Грудь с выгравированным гербом династии фон Валанциус выпячена, а металлический подбородок гордо задран, когда он величественно шагает к эшафоту.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}When you hand Seberian over to the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, you notice that the Lord Captain never lost his usual poise even in the face of death. Thrusting out his chest emblazoned with the von Valancius coat of arms and with his metal chin proudly raised, the Rogue Trader marches majestically to his execution.{/n}

{n}When you hand Seberian over to the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, you notice that the Lord Captain never once lost his signature poise, even in the face of death. Thrusting out his chest emblazoned with the von Valancius coat of arms and with his metal chin proudly raised, the Rogue Trader marches majestically to his execution.{/n}

{n}When you hand Seberian over to the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, you notice how much he has changed. Haggard, broken, and stripped of his former poise, the Lord Captain now barely staggers on his metal legs. Not so long ago, he seemed as invincible as a war machine, but now he seems almost pitiful.{/n}

{n}When you hand Seberian over to the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, you notice that the Lord Captain never lost his usual poise even in the face of death. Thrusting out his chest emblazoned with the von Valancius coat of arms and with his metal chin proudly raised, the Rogue Trader marches majestically to his execution.{/n}

{n}When you hand Seberian over to the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, you notice that the Lord Captain never once lost his signature poise, even in the face of death. Thrusting out his chest emblazoned with the von Valancius coat of arms and with his metal chin proudly raised, the Rogue Trader marches majestically to his execution.{/n}

languages.text: {n}シベリアを{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}インキジション{/g}に引き渡す際に、あなたは気づきます。ロード・キャプテンは死の直前まで、いつも通りの落ち着きを保っていたのです。フォン・ヴァランシウス家の紋章が描かれた胸を張って、金属製の顎を高く掲げ、ローグ・トレーダーは堂々と処刑台へと歩みを進めます。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}When you hand Seberian over to the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, you notice that the Lord Captain never once lost his signature poise, even in the face of death. Thrusting out his chest emblazoned with the von Valancius coat of arms and with his metal chin proudly raised, the Rogue Trader marches majestically to his execution.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}シベリアを{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}インキジション{/g}に引き渡す際に、あなたは気づきます。ロード・キャプテンは死の直前まで、いつも通りの落ち着きを保っていたのです。フォン・ヴァランシウス家の紋章が描かれた胸を張って、金属製の顎を高く掲げ、ローグ・トレーダーは堂々と処刑台へと歩みを進めます。{/n}

languages.text: {n}当你把塞贝里安交给{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}审判庭{/g}时，你注意到这位舰长大人即便面对死亡，也从未失去他那标志性的从容。行商浪人挺起绣有冯·瓦兰修斯家徽的胸膛，骄傲地抬起金属下巴，威严地走向自己的处刑之地。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}When you hand Seberian over to the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, you notice that the Lord Captain never once lost his signature poise, even in the face of death. Thrusting out his chest emblazoned with the von Valancius coat of arms and with his metal chin proudly raised, the Rogue Trader marches majestically to his execution.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}当你把塞贝里安交给{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}审判庭{/g}时，你注意到这位舰长大人即便面对死亡，也从未失去他那标志性的从容。行商浪人挺起绣有冯·瓦兰修斯家徽的胸膛，骄傲地抬起金属下巴，威严地走向自己的处刑之地。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian'ı {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Engizisyon'a{/g} teslim ettiğinde, Lord Kaptan'ın ölüm karşısında bile kendine has o duruşunu bir an olsun kaybetmediğini fark ediyorsun. Von Valancius armasıyla süslü göğsünü öne çıkaran ve metal çenesini gururla kaldıran Hür Tacir, infazına doğru görkemli bir şekilde yürüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}When you hand Seberian over to the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, you notice that the Lord Captain never once lost his signature poise, even in the face of death. Thrusting out his chest emblazoned with the von Valancius coat of arms and with his metal chin proudly raised, the Rogue Trader marches majestically to his execution.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian'ı {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Engizisyon'a{/g} teslim ettiğinde, Lord Kaptan'ın ölüm karşısında bile kendine has o duruşunu bir an olsun kaybetmediğini fark ediyorsun. Von Valancius armasıyla süslü göğsünü öne çıkaran ve metal çenesini gururla kaldıran Hür Tacir, infazına doğru görkemli bir şekilde yürüyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Cuando entregas a Seberian a la {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisición{/g}, notas que el Lord Capitán nunca ha perdido su emblemático talante, ni siquiera al enfrentarse a la muerte. Sacando pecho, mostrando orgulloso el escudo de armas de los von Valancius y levantando altivo su metálico mentón, el Comerciante Independiente se dirige majestuoso hacia su propia ejecución.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}When you hand Seberian over to the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, you notice that the Lord Captain never once lost his signature poise, even in the face of death. Thrusting out his chest emblazoned with the von Valancius coat of arms and with his metal chin proudly raised, the Rogue Trader marches majestically to his execution.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Cuando entregas a Seberian a la {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisición{/g}, notas que el Lord Capitán nunca ha perdido su emblemático talante, ni siquiera al enfrentarse a la muerte. Sacando pecho, mostrando orgulloso el escudo de armas de los von Valancius y levantando altivo su metálico mentón, el Comerciante Independiente se dirige majestuoso hacia su propia ejecución.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Lorsque vous remettez Seberian aux mains de l'{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, vous remarquez que le seigneur-capitaine n'a rien perdu de son calme habituel, même face à une mort certaine. Le libre-marchand bombe le torse pour faire ressortir les armoiries de la maison von Valancius et lève fièrement sa tête augmentée tandis qu'il s'avance vers son exécution d'une démarche majestueuse.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}When you hand Seberian over to the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, you notice that the Lord Captain never once lost his signature poise, even in the face of death. Thrusting out his chest emblazoned with the von Valancius coat of arms and with his metal chin proudly raised, the Rogue Trader marches majestically to his execution.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Lorsque vous remettez Seberian aux mains de l'{g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, vous remarquez que le seigneur-capitaine n'a rien perdu de son calme habituel, même face à une mort certaine. Le libre-marchand bombe le torse pour faire ressortir les armoiries de la maison von Valancius et lève fièrement sa tête augmentée tandis qu'il s'avance vers son exécution d'une démarche majestueuse.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Als du Seberian der {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} übergibst, bemerkst du, dass der Lord Captain seine Gelassenheit selbst im Angesicht des Todes nicht verliert. Der Freihändler wirft sich in die mit dem Wappen derer von Valancius geschmückte Brust, reckt das Kinn stolz empor und marschiert majestätisch zu seiner Hinrichtung.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}When you hand Seberian over to the {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g}, you notice that the Lord Captain never once lost his signature poise, even in the face of death. Thrusting out his chest emblazoned with the von Valancius coat of arms and with his metal chin proudly raised, the Rogue Trader marches majestically to his execution.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Als du Seberian der {g|Encyclopedia:InquisitionGlossary}Inquisition{/g} übergibst, bemerkst du, dass der Lord Captain seine Gelassenheit selbst im Angesicht des Todes nicht verliert. Der Freihändler wirft sich in die mit dem Wappen derer von Valancius geschmückte Brust, reckt das Kinn stolz empor und marschiert majestätisch zu seiner Hinrichtung.{/n}
